title: Suppress Internal Auto-Incrementing IDs from Data Export
description: When users export report/dashboard data, the internal DataTools auto-incrementing IDs and public-facing IDs should not be included in the export. These are internal identifiers that have no meaning to end users and could expose internal system details.
acceptance_criteria: Only user-meaningful fields are included in the export
middleware_changes: Modified the export function to exclude internal ID columns (id, public_facing_id) from the exported data.
implementation_notes: Configured the DataTables export buttons to exclude the id and public_facing_id columns from CSV/Excel export.
comment_summary: Waqar removed id and public-facing id from exports. Only user-meaningful fields are now exported.
